case_title: BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT (BAAQMD) VS. JOHN GARCIA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOHN DBA NU LOOK (WINDOWS &) CONSTRUCTION

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT (BAAQMD)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT (BAAQMD)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT (BAAQMD) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOHN DBA NU LOOK (WINDOWS &) CONSTRUCTION $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $37.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,037.00, DEFENDANT JOHN GARCIA NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOHN DBA NU LOOK (WINDOWS &) CONSTRUCTION
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT (BAAQMD) GARCIA, JOHN DBA NU LOOK (WINDOWS &) CONSTRUCTION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-11-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-25-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE CONTINUE FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT TO AUGUST 28, 2008 AT 1:30PM. DEFENDANT AGREED TO MAKE THREE PAYMENTS OF $500.00 ON JUNE 20, 2008, JULY 18, 2008 AND AUGUST 23, 2008. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. ALL PARTIES ARE PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.
